## Purpose 
<!--- One sentence to describe the purpose of this PR, refer to any linked issues:
#14 -- this will link to issue 14
Closes #2 -- this will automatically close issue 2 on PR merge
-->
Adds 8 parameters to allow SCM to relax to forcing file profile towards forcing file profile (for use in GCM-driven cases).

title: adds scm relaxation timescale parameters

body: Add data-driven perturbation pressure and mixing length parameters
